summary: Phase 2, 3, 4 Integration Testing Complete. Fixed critical bug in Sales.tsx (fetchData hoisting issue). All Phase 4 dashboard widgets working. Phase 2 CRM/HR detail modals with tabs working. Phase 3 resource broadcasts verified via API tests.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails in preview environment (wss:// connection closed before established). This is expected - WebSocket only works in local tsx runtime, not in Vercel/preview.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts rendering issue on initial load, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Sales.tsx had fetchData function defined AFTER useLiveSync call, causing 'Cannot access fetchData before initialization' error
FIXED: Sales.tsx had reference to non-existent fetchInvoices function, changed to fetchData
Phase 4 /api/stats endpoint correctly returns all new fields: outstanding, topClients, upcomingLeaves, expiringContracts, lowStock, pendingLeaves
Phase 2 ContactDetailModal has all 4 tabs (Info/Devis/Factures/Projets) with count badges and clickable rows
Phase 2 EmployeeDetailModal has all 5 tabs (Info/Contrats/Bulletins/Congés/Tâches) with count badges
Phase 3 resourceChangeBroadcaster middleware correctly intercepts POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE and broadcasts RESOURCE_CHANGED events
Phase 3 useLiveSync hook properly subscribes to WebSocket events and debounces refetch
updated_files: /app/src/modules/Sales.tsx (fixed fetchData hoisting issue and fetchInvoices reference)

success_rate.backend: 96% (25/26 tests passed, 1 skipped - no products for update test)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_LIVE_ prefix and cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2/3/4 integration complete. Sales.tsx fetchData hoisting bug fixed. WebSocket only works in local runtime (not preview/Vercel). All dashboard widgets have data-testid attributes. CRM contact detail modal navigates to /sales?open=:id which opens invoice preview.

frontend_tests: Dashboard Phase 4 widgets - PASSED (all 7 widgets found with data-testid)
CRM Contact Detail Modal - PASSED (4 tabs: Info/Devis/Factures/Projets)
HR Employee Detail Modal - PASSED (5 tabs: Info/Contrats/Bulletins/Congés/Tâches)
Sales deep-link navigation - PASSED (CRM → /sales?open=:id opens invoice preview)

bugs_fixed.cause: useLiveSync hook called fetchData before it was defined (const hoisting issue)
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved fetchData function definition before useLiveSync call

bugs_fixed.cause: handleConvertToInvoice called fetchInvoices() which doesn't exist

phase3_websocket_broadcast.note: WebSocket only works in local tsx runtime, degrades gracefully in preview/Vercel
